title: Sheikah Font
description: Adds the Sheikah alphabet from The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild as a font and banner patterns.
body:
This mod adds a **font based on the** [**Sheikah alphabet**](https://zeldawiki.wiki/wiki/Sheikah_(Language)) found in The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild and Tears of the Kingdom, as well as **40 banner patterns** based on the 40 characters from it.

The font can be used by any [JSON text](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Text_component_format) (it has id `sheikahfont:sheikah`), such as with the `/tellraw` or `/title` commands on in custom item names. If you have [Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib), you can also use the `/bookshelf font` command for easy uses.

The font supports:
* All 26 latin letters A to Z (upper and lowercase are displayed the same),
* All 10 arabic numerals 0 to 9,
* Dash (-), dot (.), exclamation (!) and question mark (?).

**To get the banner patterns, craft the Banner Pattern item** and use it in a Loom, as you would with any other. It is crafted with one each of Paper, Cobblestone, Lapis Lazuli, and Redstone.

![Screenshot of all 40 banner patterns in various colors.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OweKUqeV/images/e5d29b4e62f104ec99ad08d40453114466abb3b7.png)

This was inspired by Darkhax's font mods, such as [Unown Font](https://modrinth.com/mod/unown-font).
